source.survey: U.S. Census Bureau, 2024 American Community Survey 1-Year Estimates
source.basis: Median age of adults 18+, linearly interpolated across the 18+ age brackets

layout.layout: U.S. Census Bureau TIGER/Line cartographic boundaries (cb_2024_us_cd119_20m)
layout.author: U.S. Census Bureau
layout.projection: Albers USA (Alaska and Hawaii inset), pre-projected at build
